title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY STO. NIÃO, PARAÃAQUE CITY TO BE KNOWN AS STO. NINO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 5385 ; Manila Bulletin (May 27, 2016); 112 OG No. 30, 4652 (July 25, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10852, May 23, 2016 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY STO. NIÃO, PARAÃAQUE CITY TO BE KNOWN AS STO. NINO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Department of Education, a national high school in Barangay Sto. Niño, Parañaque City to be known as Sto. Niño National High School.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education shall immediately include in the Departmentâs program the operationalization of the Sto. Niño National High School, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. The Secretary of Education shall issue rules and regulations necessary to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on February 23, 2015 and February 2, 2016, respectively.

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 23 2016

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
